## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the PSR-12 coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary
- [ ] No `var_dump`, `print_r`, or debug code left in

### Security
- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or secrets are committed
- [ ] User inputs are properly sanitized and validated
- [ ] SQL queries use prepared statements
- [ ] No new SQL injection or XSS vectors introduced

### Database
- [ ] Migration files are included if schema changed
- [ ] Database changes are backward compatible

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README if necessary
- [ ] I have updated `.env.example` if new env vars were added
